title: sideritis spinulosa var. intermedia
intro: Sideritis spinulosa var. intermedia, also known as intermediate Greek mountain tea or mountain tea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Sideritis. It is native to the mountainous regions of Greece and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Sideritis spinulosa var. intermedia is often used as a tea or tincture, and can also be found in capsule or powder form, often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
